    Deck.dealCard()
    Deals the top card from the main deck face up.
    Card

    Deals the top card from the main deck with the specified face direction.

    Card
    Table.getTopCard()
    Returns the top card of the discard pile â€” the last card played on the table â€” without removing it.
    Card
    Deck.peekDiscard()
    Returns the top card of the discard pile without removing it.
    Card
    AbstractPlayer.playCard(int index, Deck deck)
    Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.
    Card
    IPlayer.playCard(int index, Deck deck)
    Plays the card at the given index: removes it from the hand, sends it to the discard pile, and returns it so the caller can update the table sum.

    Deck.discard(Card card)
    Places a card onto the top of the discard pile, face up.
    boolean
    Table.isCardPlayable(Card card)
    Returns true if playing the given card would keep the table sum at or below 50.
    void

    Places a card on the table and updates the sum.
